content:
During the  boss fight of a P-Dive, suddenly "The Chosen One" wasn't anywhere in my deck anymore: not in hand, not in the draw pile nor the discard pile. I had to do without it until the end of the investigation, except once Tawil's rouse made it available in the list of cards from where I can choose three. I think this happened to me once before. What could the reason be?
Here a screenshot of the investigation team.
thread_title: Why did Miryam's "The Chosen One" disappear from my deck in the middle of boss fight?
